## Steps to Reproduce

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- **Docker Compose version**: [e.g., v2.23.0]

- **Browser** (if UI-related): [e.g., Chrome 120]
